pr-reviewer.user_message: Review this PR that adds a login endpoint with password handling
Review this PR that refactors the database connection pool

expected_behaviors: Includes both happy path and error cases

tech-debt-hunter.user_message: Scan src/ for technical debt at medium severity or higher
expected_behaviors: Identifies code duplication or complexity issues

ci-fixer.user_message: Diagnose and fix the CI failure for run 12345
expected_behaviors: Reads CI logs to identify the failure
Considers whether the fix could break other tests

conflict-resolver.user_message: Resolve merge conflicts in PR #42 using smart strategy

research.user_message: Research topic: async patterns in Python. Depth: standard
expected_behaviors: Covers multiple async approaches (asyncio, threading, multiprocessing)

onboarding.user_message: Generate a comprehensive onboarding guide for this codebase

expected_behaviors: Checks for broken links or missing references
Provides a health score or summary
